title: CompSelectionPayload
description: Server-side validation schema for the Comp Selection game-settings payload (POST /api/settings/comp-selection).

enabledIds.description: IDs of the competition games that the player has enabled.

weeklyLimit.description: Maximum number of comps to draw each week. null or absent means no limit.

filterCategory.description: Active category filter stored with the selection, or null for 'all'.
